formats.description: Configuration for the CSV/TSV format reader/writer

codeFinderRules.description: Regex patterns that match inline codes within translatable text

columnNamesRow.description: 1-based row number containing column names. 0 means auto-detect.

commentColumns.description: Column indices (0-based) that contain comments or notes

hasHeader.description: If true, the first row is treated as headers (non-translatable)

keyColumns.description: Column indices (0-based) that provide the block ID (source ID / record ID)

separator.description: Field delimiter character (comma for CSV, tab for TSV)

textQualifier.description: Character used to quote field values containing delimiters or newlines

translatableColumns.description: Column indices (0-based) to extract as translatable content. If empty, all columns are translatable.

trimValues.description: If true, leading and trailing whitespace is removed from cell values

useCodeFinder.description: Enable regex-based inline code detection within cell values

valuesStartRow.description: 1-based row number where data values begin. 0 means auto-detect.

formats.description: Extracts translatable text from Doxygen/Javadoc comments in source code

codeFinderRules.description: Regex patterns that match inline codes within translatable text

preserveWhitespace.description: Preserve original whitespace in extracted comment text instead of normalizing it

useCodeFinder.description: Enable regex-based detection of inline codes within translatable text

formats.description: Configuration for the native HTML format reader/writer

attributes.description: Global attribute extraction rules -- maps attribute names to their rule configuration (ruleTypes, allElementsExcept, onlyTheseElements, conditions)

codeFinderRules.description: Regex patterns that match inline codes within translatable text

elements.description: Element extraction rules -- maps element names to their rule configuration (ruleTypes, conditions, idAttributes, translatableAttributes)

preserveWhitespace.description: Preserve original whitespace in extracted text instead of collapsing it

useCodeFinder.description: Enable regex-based detection of inline codes (placeholders, variables, tags) within translatable text

formats.description: Configuration for the native JSON format reader/writer

codeFinderRules.description: Regex patterns that match inline codes within translatable text.

escapeForwardSlashes.description: Escape forward slashes in output JSON (\/).

exceptions.description: Regex pattern for key names. When extractAllPairs is true, matching keys are excluded. When false, matching keys are included.

extractAllPairs.description: Extract all key-value pairs for translation. When false, use extractionRules to specify which paths to extract.

extractIsolatedStrings.description: Extract string values in arrays (without keys) as translatable blocks.

extractionRules.description: Regex pattern for JSON paths to extract. Overrides extractAllPairs when specified.

genericMetaRules.description: Regex for keys whose values become generic metadata.

idRules.description: Regex for keys whose values become Block IDs (overrides useKeyAsName).

maxwidthRules.description: Regex for keys whose values set max width constraints.

noteRules.description: Regex for keys whose values become translator notes.

subfilter.description: Global subfilter format name (e.g., 'html') applied to all or matching extracted strings.

subfilterRules.description: Regex matching keys for which values should be processed with the sub-filter.

subfilters.description: Array of {pattern, format} mappings for embedded content in specific keys.

useCodeFinder.description: Enable pattern-based detection of inline codes (placeholders, tags, etc.).

useFullKeyPath.description: Use full path (/key1/key2) instead of immediate key as name.

useIdStack.description: Build TextUnit IDs from nested key stack.

useKeyAsName.description: Use JSON key as the Block (TextUnit) name for reference.

useLeadingSlashOnKeyPath.description: Include leading slash in key path names.

formats.description: Configuration for the Markdown format reader/writer

codeFinderRules.description: Regex patterns that match inline codes within translatable text

subfilter.description: Subfilter format to apply to HTML content within Markdown (e.g., 'html')

translateBlockQuotes.description: If true, blockquote content is translatable.

translateCodeBlocks.description: If true, fenced and indented code blocks are translatable. If false, emitted as non-translatable data.

translateFrontMatter.description: If true, YAML front matter values are translatable. If false, emitted as non-translatable data.

translateHTMLBlocks.description: If true, raw HTML blocks are translatable. If false, emitted as non-translatable data.

translateImageAlt.description: If true, image alt text is included in translatable content.

translateURLs.description: If true, link and image URLs are translatable.

unescapeBackslashCharacters.description: Parse backslash-escaped punctuation in source documents

useCodeFinder.description: Enable regex-based inline code detection within translatable text

formats.description: Writer for compiled gettext MO catalogs. Consumes Blocks and emits a binary catalog keyed by (msgctxt, msgid). msgctxt is taken from Block.Properties["context"] when present, else Block.Name, else Block.ID.
Configuration for the DOCX/PPTX/XLSX format reader/writer

aggressiveCleanup.description: Strip revision IDs, proofing errors, and other noise before merging runs.

automaticallyAcceptRevisions.description: Automatically accept tracked changes before extraction.

codeFinderRules.description: Regex patterns that match inline codes within translatable text.

excludeColors.description: Font colors to exclude (hex RGB, e.g., "FF0000" for red).

excludedSheets.description: Sheet names to exclude from extraction.

extractRunFontsInfo.description: Emit font metadata as annotations on blocks.

fontMappings.description: Font name to script group mapping (e.g., "MS Gothic": "ja").

ignoreSoftHyphenTag.description: Ignore soft hyphen tags in the document.

includeHighlightColors.description: If non-empty, only extract text with these highlight colors.

includeStyles.description: If non-empty, only extract text with these styles.

includedSlides.description: If non-empty, only extract these slide numbers (1-based).

lineSeparatorReplacement.description: Replacement string for line separator characters.

optimiseWordStyles.description: Resolve style inheritance and strip redundant run properties.

replaceLineSeparator.description: Replace Unicode line separator (U+2028) in output.

replaceNoBreakHyphenTag.description: Replace no-break hyphen tags with the non-breaking hyphen character.

tabAsCharacter.description: Treat tab elements as tab characters instead of placeholder spans.

translateComments.description: Extract comment text from Word documents.

translateDocProperties.description: Extract title, subject, keywords from document properties.

translateFootnotes.description: Extract footnotes and endnotes from Word documents.

translateHeadersFooters.description: Extract text from headers and footers in Word documents.

translateHiddenSlides.description: Extract content from hidden slides in PowerPoint.

translateHiddenText.description: Extract text with the vanish (hidden) property in Word documents.

translateSharedStrings.description: Extract shared strings from Excel workbooks.

translateSheetNames.description: Extract sheet names in Excel workbooks.

translateSlideMasters.description: Extract text from slide masters in PowerPoint.

translateSlideNotes.description: Extract speaker notes in PowerPoint presentations.

useCodeFinder.description: Enable pattern-based detection of inline codes (placeholders, tags, etc.).

formats.description: Extracts translatable strings from PHP source files

extractOutsideDirectives.description: Extract translatable strings found outside directive-controlled regions.

useDirectives.description: Honor //okapi: skip/text directives in PHP source to control extraction scope.

formats.description: Configuration for the plain text format reader/writer

segmentByLine.description: If true, each line becomes a separate block. If false, paragraphs (separated by blank lines) are blocks.

formats.description: Configuration for the PO/POT format reader/writer

allowEmptyOutputTarget.description: Allow empty target in output when no translation is available

bilingualMode.description: In bilingual mode (default), msgid is the source text and msgstr is the target. In monolingual mode, msgid is treated as an ID.

codeFinderRules.description: Regex patterns that match inline codes within translatable text

preserveUntranslated.description: If true, entries with empty msgstr are emitted as blocks. If false, they are skipped.

useCodeFinder.description: Enable regex-based inline code detection within PO message text

wrapContent.description: Wrap long content lines in output at approximately 80 characters

formats.description: Configuration for the Java .properties format reader/writer

codeFinderRules.description: Regex patterns that match inline codes within translatable text

commentsAreNotes.description: Treat comments as translator notes attached to the following entry

escapeExtendedChars.description: Escape extended Unicode characters (non-ASCII) in output using \uXXXX notation

extraComments.description: Recognize semicolon and double-slash comment styles in addition to standard # and ! markers

extractOnlyMatchingKey.description: When enabled, extract only entries whose keys match the condition; otherwise exclude matching keys

keyCondition.description: Regular expression pattern to test against property keys for extraction filtering

useCodeFinder.description: Enable regex-based inline code detection within property values

useJavaEscapes.description: Keep Java property escape sequences (\: \= \# \!) in extracted text instead of resolving them

useKeyCondition.description: Filter entries for extraction based on a regex condition applied to their keys

formats.description: SubRip subtitle format — no configurable parameters
Configuration for the native TMX translation memory format reader/writer

codeFinderRules.description: Regex patterns that match inline codes within translatable text

exitOnInvalid.description: Stop processing when encountering invalid TUs. When false, invalid TUs are skipped.

processAllTargets.description: Read all target language TUVs from each TU. When false, only the first target is read.

useCodeFinder.description: Enable regex-based inline code detection in translatable text

formats.description: Configuration for the CSV/TSV format reader/writer

codeFinderRules.description: Regex patterns that match inline codes within translatable text

columnNamesRow.description: 1-based row number containing column names. 0 means auto-detect.

commentColumns.description: Column indices (0-based) that contain comments or notes

hasHeader.description: If true, the first row is treated as headers (non-translatable)

keyColumns.description: Column indices (0-based) that provide the block ID (source ID / record ID)

separator.description: Field delimiter character (comma for CSV, tab for TSV)

textQualifier.description: Character used to quote field values containing delimiters or newlines

translatableColumns.description: Column indices (0-based) to extract as translatable content. If empty, all columns are translatable.

trimValues.description: If true, leading and trailing whitespace is removed from cell values

useCodeFinder.description: Enable regex-based inline code detection within cell values

valuesStartRow.description: 1-based row number where data values begin. 0 means auto-detect.

formats.description: Timed Text Markup Language (W3C standard) subtitle format

cjkCharsPerLine.description: Maximum number of characters per line for CJK languages. Set to 0 to disable.

escapeBR.description:
When true,
elements are removed and text is joined with spaces; when false,
is preserved as literal text.

maxCharsPerLine.description: Maximum number of characters per line in output. Set to 0 to disable.

maxLinesPerCaption.description: Maximum number of lines per caption in output. Set to 0 to disable.

mergeAdjacentCaptions.description:
Merge adjacent

elements ending with trailing punctuation into one block.

splitWords.description: Split words so that they don't go over the character limit per line.

formats.description: Web Video Text Tracks (WebVTT) subtitle format

cjkCharsPerLine.description: Maximum number of characters per line for CJK languages. Set to 0 to disable.

maxCharsPerLine.description: Maximum number of characters per line in output. Set to 0 to disable.

maxLinesPerCaption.description: Maximum number of lines per caption in output. Set to 0 to disable.

splitWords.description: Split words so that they don't go over the character limit per line.

formats.description: Configuration for the Wiki (MediaWiki/DokuWiki) format reader/writer

preserveWhitespace.description: Preserve original whitespace in wiki markup instead of normalizing it.

variant.description: Wiki markup variant: mediawiki or dokuwiki. Default is dokuwiki to match the okf_wiki bridge contract.

formats.description: Configuration for the native XLIFF 1.2 bilingual exchange format reader/writer

addAltTrans.description: Allow addition of new alt-trans elements

addTargetLanguage.description: Add the target-language attribute to file elements if not already present

allowEmptyTargets.description: Allow target elements with empty content to be written

alwaysAddTargets.description: Add target elements for monolingual XLIFF files that have no target in the source

codeFinderRules.description: Regex patterns that match inline codes within translatable text

editAltTrans.description: Allow editing of existing alt-trans elements

fallbackToID.description: Use the trans-unit id attribute as the block name when no resname attribute is present

forceUniqueIds.description: Rewrite trans-unit IDs to enforce uniqueness across the file

ignoreInputSegmentation.description: Ignore seg-source/mrk segmentation from the input XLIFF and treat the full source as a single segment

includeExtensions.description: Include non-standard namespace extension elements in extracted content

includeIts.description: Include ITS (Internationalization Tag Set) markup in extracted content

overrideTargetLanguage.description: Override the target-language attribute in the output document with the pipeline target locale

preserveSpaceByDefault.description: Treat all content as xml:space="preserve" unless explicitly overridden

targetStateValue.description: State value to set on target elements when useTranslationTargetState is enabled

useCodeFinder.description: Enable regex-based inline code detection in translatable text

useTranslationTargetState.description: Update the state attribute on target elements when writing translated XLIFF

formats.description: Configuration for the native XLIFF 2.0/2.1/2.2 bilingual exchange format reader/writer

codeFinderRules.description: Regex patterns that match inline codes within translatable text

discardInvalidTargets.description: Discard targets that fail validation rather than rejecting the entire file

forceUniqueIds.description: Ensure inline tag IDs are unique within each unit

ignoreTagTypeMatch.description: Ignore tag type mismatch between source and target segments

useCodeFinder.description: Enable regex-based inline code detection in translatable text

version.description: Target XLIFF 2.x version to emit. Empty means: preserve the input document version on roundtrip, otherwise default to 2.2.

writeOriginalData.description: Output includes original data when available

formats.description: Configuration for the generic XML format reader/writer

attributes.description: Advanced attribute-specific processing rules with element scope constraints

blockTypeMap.description: Map of element names to block type strings for semantic type annotation

codeFinderRules.description: Regex patterns that match inline codes within translatable text

elements.description: Advanced element-specific processing rules with conditions, inline marking, and translatable attribute mappings

excludeByDefault.description: Exclude all elements unless explicitly included by an element rule with INCLUDE

excludedElements.description: Element names whose content is excluded from extraction

groupElements.description: Element names that produce group/layer boundaries in the output

idAttributes.description: Attribute names used to extract block IDs from elements

inlineElements.description: Element names treated as inline (spans within text) rather than block-level

preserveWhitespace.description: Preserve original whitespace in text content instead of collapsing it

preserveWhitespaceElements.description: Element names that preserve whitespace regardless of the global setting

subfilters.description: Array of {pattern, format} mappings for embedded content. Patterns use dot-separated element paths with glob support.

translatableAttributes.description: Attribute names that are translatable across all elements

translatableElements.description: Element names whose text content is translatable. If empty, all text content is translatable.

useCodeFinder.description: Enable regex-based detection of inline codes within translatable text

formats.description: Configuration for the native YAML format reader/writer

codeFinderRules.description: Regex patterns that match inline codes within translatable text

extractNonStrings.description: Extract non-string scalar values (booleans, numbers, nulls) as translatable blocks

keyPathPatterns.description: When non-empty, only keys matching one of these glob patterns are extracted. Supports * (single key) and ** (any depth).

subfilter.description: Sub-filter to apply to scalar values (e.g., 'html' to process HTML within YAML values)

useCodeFinder.description: Enable regex-based inline code detection within string values
